newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: jo
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ GAMEPLAY ][/p][list][*][p]Removed map-wide minimum one point of damage from new C4 explosions.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where new C4 damage was calculated incorrectly near boundaries to other map areas.[/p][/*][*][p]New C4 explosions now apply more force to dropped weapons.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ ARMORY ][/p][list][*][p]Adjusted the "Sniper Ahead" sticker visibility when scraped.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed a case where season medals were missing their gold tint on one of the bars.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where the scoreboard wouldn't update while open.[/p][/*][*][p]Various stability improvements.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ GAMEPLAY ][/p][list][*][p]Removed map-wide minimum one point of damage from new C4 explosions.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where new C4 damage was calculated incorrectly near boundaries to other map areas.[/p][/*][*][p]New C4 explosions now apply more force to dropped weapons.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ ARMORY ][/p][list][*][p]Adjusted the "Sniper Ahead" sticker visibility when scraped.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed a case where season medals were missing their gold tint on one of the bars.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where the scoreboard wouldn't update while open.[/p][/*][*][p]Various stability improvements.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ GAMEPLAY ][/p][list][*][p]删除了新 C4 爆炸造成的全地图最小 1 点伤害。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了在其他地图区域边界附近错误计算新 C4 伤害的情况。[/p][/*][*][p]新 C4 爆炸现在对掉落物施加更大的力武器。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ 军械库 ][/p][list][*][p]调整了刮擦时“前方狙击手”贴纸的可见性。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]修复了赛季奖牌缺少金色色调的情况其中一个栏。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了记分板在打开时无法更新的情况。[/p][/*][*][p]各种稳定性改进。[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: brianlev
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ PREMIER ][/p][list][*][p]Premier Season Five has begun[/p][/*][*][p]Added Cache to the Active Duty Map Pool[/p][/*][*][p]Removed Overpass from the Active Duty Map Pool[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ GAMEPLAY ][/p][list][*][p]Re-designed effective range and extent of C4 explosion damage on all official defusal-mode maps.[/p][list][*][p]Damage is now applied according to precomputed simulation values, baked into the compiled map.[/p][/*][*][p]Explosion shockwave damage now rapidly expands from the center of the explosion instead of being applied instantly.[/p][/*][/list][/*][*][p]Fixed case where picking up dropped weapons through the Buy Menu would fail to complete.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ ARMORY ][/p][list][*][p]Added two new weapon collections based on the recent Call to Arms community announcement: Spy Tech + Arabesque[/p][/*][*][p]Added two new sticker collections based on the recent Call to Arms community announcement: Fruits & Vegetables + Auto Racing[/p][/*][*][p]Train 2025 and Sport & Field weapon collections are no longer available in the Armory[/p][/*][*][p]Sugarface 2 and Elemental Craft sticker collections are no longer available in the Armory[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ WORKSHOP ][/p][list][*][p]Updated "Custom Paint Job Extended" [/p][list][*][p]Added option to include a dedicated overlay mask texture [/p][/*][*][p]Added option to set unique overlay UV randomization separate from albedo UV randomization [/p][/*][/list][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Reduced the performance cost of showing the scoreboard.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where material blending effects would disappear when you got too close (e.g. the dirt on the barrels in Inferno Banana).[/p][/*][*][p]Increased sticker rotation precision to allow half-degree increments on application screen.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAP SCRIPTING ][/p][list][*][p]Added Instance.QueueAfterThinks[/p][/*][*][p]Added Instance.OnWeaponDrop[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSWeaponBase.GetOriginalOwner[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a crash when the name passed to Instance.RegisterCheatCommand collided with an existing command.[/p][/*][*][p]Added file name and line number to errors caught during the CompileModule step of script loading.[/p][/*][*][p]Removed support for deprecated vts assets.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ ENGINE ][/p][list][*][p]Updated engine code to the latest version of Source 2[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][list][*][p]Removed community maps: Warden, Stronghold, Alpine, and Sanctum from all game modes[/p][/*][*][p]Added community maps Boulder, Fachwerk, and Shelter to Competitive, Casual, and Deathmatch modes[/p][/*][*][p]Added community maps Debris and El Dorado to Wingman mode[/p][/*][/list][p]Cache[/p][list][*][p]Various clipping adjustments[/p][/*][/list][p]Dust II[/p][list][*][p]Fixed pixel gap Outside Tunnel[/p][/*][*][p]Clipping adjustment Outside Tunnel[/p][/*][/list][p]Inferno[/p][list][*][p]Clipping fix to prevent pixel boost at Top of Mid[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ PREMIER ][/p][list][*][p]Premier 第五季已经开始[/p][/*][*][p]向现役地图池添加了缓存[/p][/*][*][p]从现役地图池中删除了立交桥[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ 游戏玩法][/p][list][*][p]在所有官方拆除模式地图上重新设计了 C4 爆炸伤害的有效范围和程度。[/p][list][*][p]现在根据预先计算的模拟值应用伤害，并将其烘焙到编译的地图中。[/p][/*][*][p]爆炸冲击波伤害现在从爆炸中心快速扩展，而不是应用[/p][/*][/list][/*][*][p]修复了通过购买菜单拾取掉落武器无法完成的情况。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ ARMORY ][/p][list][*][p]根据最近的 Call to Arms 社区公告添加了两个新武器收藏：Spy Tech +阿拉伯式花纹[/p][/*][*][p]根据最近的《战斗召唤》社区公告添加了两个新的贴纸收藏：水果和蔬菜 + 赛车[/p][/*][*][p]军械库中不再提供火车 2025 和运动与田野武器收藏[/p][/*][*][p]Sugarface 2 和元素工艺贴纸收藏不再在军械库中提供军械库[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ WORKSHOP ][/p][list][*][p]更新了“自定义绘制作业扩展”[/p][list][*][p]添加了包含专用叠加遮罩纹理的选项[/p][/*][*][p]添加了设置独立于反照率 UV 的唯一叠加 UV 随机化的选项随机化[/p][/*][/list][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]降低了显示记分板的性能成本。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了当距离太近时材质混合效果会消失的情况（例如《地狱》中桶上的污垢） Banana)。[/p][/*][*][p]提高了贴纸旋转精度，允许在应用程序屏幕上以半度为增量。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ 地图脚本 ][/p][list][*][p]添加了 Instance.QueueAfterThinks[/p][/*][*][p]添加Instance.OnWeaponDrop[/p][/*][*][p]添加了 CSWeaponBase.GetOriginalOwner[/p][/*][*][p]修复了传递给 Instance.RegisterCheatCommand 的名称与现有命令冲突时发生的崩溃。[/p][/*][*][p]为脚本的 CompileModule 步骤中捕获的错误添加了文件名和行号正在加载。[/p][/*][*][p]删除了对已弃用的 vts 资源的支持。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ ENGINE ][/p][list][*][p]将引擎代码更新为最新版本的 Source 2[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][list][*][p]从所有游戏模式中删除了社区地图：Warden、Stronghold、Alpine 和 Sanctum[/p][/*][*][p]在竞争、休闲和死亡竞赛模式中添加了社区地图 Boulder、Fachwerk 和 Shelter[/p][/*][*][p]在 Wingman 中添加了社区地图 Debris 和 El Dorado模式[/p][/*][/list][p]缓存[/p][list][*][p]各种裁剪调整[/p][/*][/list][p]Dust II[/p][list][*][p]固定像素间隙隧道外[/p][/*][*][p]裁剪调整外部隧道[/p][/*][/list][p]Inferno[/p][list][*][p]剪切修复以防止中间顶部的像素增强[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: Season 5, Armory, and More
newsitems.author: brianlev
newsitems.contents:
[h3]Reporting for Active Duty[/h3]

[img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/bace68e72c87d8b04e5b28953e2de63dda54d9c8.png[/img]
Cache has officially arrived, and replaces Overpass in the active duty map pool. Put your hard-earned strats to the test and rise through the Premier ranks in CS2's newest battlefield.

[h3]Get out of there, it's gonna blow![/h3]

[img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/ace20715ffc694f3f4b2cad5e1f0db5c00340b00.png[/img]
Season 5 has arrived with some explosive changes to CS2--bomb damage has been completely reworked.

Now, when the bomb detonates, an explosive wave of destruction will flow from the bombsite through the map. As before, if you're too close to the bomb when it explodes, you're toast--but the shockwave dissipates around corners and doesn't go through walls, so at a certain distance you can use your wits to survive. Or, if you're not confident your wits are up to the task, check your health bar which will flash a preview of how well you'll fare after the blast. 

[h3]Answering the Call[/h3]

[img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/33b94ca261b8ca57c089ed7e139717bb51915bc4.png[/img]
We sent out a call to arms recently for some new weapon and sticker collections, and the community answered! Head to the Armory, where you'll find two new weapon collections, Arabesque and  Spy Tech.

[img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/caab8a836c22e0fa30b7ecce05d837a7e328682c.png[/img]
Two new sticker collections, Fruits & Vegetables and Auto Racing, have also been added to the Armory. 

[img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/6afa2c87197b36855fd352530302cfa6f46d2c3d.png[/img]

[h3]Community Maps[/h3]

[img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/68b88089a85428b03204d15de98ee27575f96554.png[/img]
Speaking of the CS community, there are some new maps to try. Boulder, Fachwerk, and Shelter have been added to Competitive, Casual, and Deathmatch modes, while Debris and El Dorado are now available in Wingman.

[h3]...And More[/h3]

We've fixed some bugs, tweaked some maps, and scoreboard performance has been improved so you can check your stats as often as you like. 

Check out the release notes for all the details in today's update!

Check out the release notes for all the details in today's update!
newsitems.title_cn: 第 5 季、军械库及更多内容
newsitems.contents_cn:
[h3]现役报告[/h3]

[img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/bace68e72c87d8b04e5b28953e2de63dda54d9c8.png[/img]
Cache已正式到来，并取代现役地图池中的Overpass。考验你来之不易的策略，在 CS2 的最新战场中晋级至尊级别。

[h3]快离开那里，它会爆炸！[/h3]

[img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/ace20715ffc694f3f4b2cad5e1f0db5c00340b00.png[/img]
第五季已经到来，CS2 发生了一些爆炸性的变化——炸弹伤害已被完全重新设计。

现在，当炸弹爆炸时，爆炸性的破坏波将从炸弹地点流过地图。和以前一样，如果炸弹爆炸时你距离炸弹太近，你就完蛋了——但冲击波会在角落里消散，不会穿过墙壁，所以在一定距离内你可以发挥你的智慧来生存。或者，如果你对自己的智慧无法胜任这项任务，请检查你的健康栏，它会预览你在爆炸后的表现。 

[h3]接听电话[/h3]

[img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/33b94ca261b8ca57c089ed7e139717bb51915bc4.png[/img]
我们最近发出了征集一些新武器和贴纸的号召，社区做出了回应！前往军械库，在那里你会发现两种新的武器收藏：阿拉伯式花纹和间谍科技。

[img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/caab8a836c22e0fa30b7ecce05d837a7e328682c.png[/img]
军械库中还添加了两个新的贴纸系列：《水果和蔬菜》和《赛车》。 

[img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/6afa2c87197b36855fd352530302cfa6f46d2c3d.png[/img]

[h3]社区地图[/h3]

[img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/68b88089a85428b03204d15de98ee27575f96554.png[/img]
说到CS社区，有一些新地图可以尝试。 Boulder、Fachwerk 和 Shelter 已添加到竞争、休闲和死亡竞赛模式中，而 Debris 和 El Dorado 现已在 Wingman 中提供。

[h3]...还有更多[/h3]

我们修复了一些错误，调整了一些地图，并且记分板性能也得到了改进，因此您可以根据需要经常检查您的统计数据。 

查看发行说明，了解今天更新的所有详细信息！

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 might be the biggest game on Steam, but Global Offensive is breaking player count records since it went standalone again
newsitems.author: Justin Wagner
newsitems.contents: nytime you're talking about the hottest game on Steam, there's an evergreen unspoken caveat: 'after Counter-Strike, of course.' CS2 is unquestionably Steam's killer app—it has well over a million concurrent players as I write this according to SteamDB, and it's showing no signs of slowing down. But don't count out the game it once absorbed and then spat out: its predecessor, Global Offensive... Read more.
newsitems.title_en: Counter-Strike 2 might be the biggest game on Steam, but Global Offensive is breaking player count records since it went standalone again
newsitems.contents_en: nytime you're talking about the hottest game on Steam, there's an evergreen unspoken caveat: 'after Counter-Strike, of course.' CS2 is unquestionably Steam's killer app—it has well over a million concurrent players as I write this according to SteamDB, and it's showing no signs of slowing down. But don't count out the game it once absorbed and then spat out: its predecessor, Global Offensive... Read more.
newsitems.title_cn: 《反恐精英 2》可能是 Steam 上最大的游戏，但《全球攻势》自再次独立以来正在打破玩家数量记录
newsitems.contents_cn: 每当您谈论 Steam 上最热门的游戏时，总会有一个不言而喻的警告：“当然是在《反恐精英》之后。” CS2 毫无疑问是 Steam 的杀手级应用——根据 SteamDB 的说法，它的并发玩家数量远远超过一百万，并且没有任何放缓的迹象。但不要指望游戏一旦吸收和然后吐出：前作《全球攻势》... 了解更多。

newsitems.title: The Jackass Sticker Capsule
newsitems.author: COMPLEX
newsitems.contents:
[img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/cc6a469cea898157d07b667ed256a3801cd737e2.png[/img]
Today we’re excited to release the Jackass Sticker Capsule in association with Paramount Games Studio, Jackass graphic artist Andy Jenkins, and community artist TheDanidem.

Celebrating the release of [i]jackass: best and last[/i], the Jackass Sticker Capsule contains 39 stickers referencing iconic Jackass moments.

Whether it’s an airhorn on a golf course or a trip down Electric Avenue, there’s something for every jackass in here; even you!
newsitems.contents_en:
[img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/cc6a469cea898157d07b667ed256a3801cd737e2.png[/img]
Today we’re excited to release the Jackass Sticker Capsule in association with Paramount Games Studio, Jackass graphic artist Andy Jenkins, and community artist TheDanidem.

Celebrating the release of [i]jackass: best and last[/i], the Jackass Sticker Capsule contains 39 stickers referencing iconic Jackass moments.

Whether it’s an airhorn on a golf course or a trip down Electric Avenue, there’s something for every jackass in here; even you!
newsitems.contents_cn:
[img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/cc6a469cea898157d07b667ed256a3801cd737e2.png[/img]
今天，我们很高兴与 Paramount Games Studio、Jackass 图形艺术家 Andy Jenkins 和社区艺术家 TheDanidem 合作发布 Jackass Sticker Capsule。

为了庆祝《[i]jackass：最好的和最后的[/i]》的发行，Jackass 贴纸胶囊包含 39 张引用标志性 Jackass 时刻的贴纸。

无论是高尔夫球场上的汽笛，还是电气大道上的旅行，这里都有适合每个蠢货的东西；甚至你！

newsitems.title: Team Falcons' Finale
newsitems.author: COMPLEX
newsitems.contents:
[p][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/97e2906ad1381f57c881ca5049649e1d38001ac3.jpg[/img]Taking on the toughest Playoff bracket in Major history, the Falcons made a triumphant statement at the IEM Cologne 2026 Major.

Facing the defending Major Champions in the Quarterfinals, Falcons defeated Vitality 2-1, with each map taking 24 rounds to determine a winner. The Semifinals weren't any easier, where the Falcons met Team Spirit in a best of three that saw two maps go to Overtime. In the end, the Falcons outlasted Team Spirit 16:12 on Dust II, taking the series 2-1 and booking their first appearance in the Grand Finals. 

In the Grand Finals the Falcons left no doubt, defeating FURIA 3-0 to claim the organization's first Major Championship.

[img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/1a646666feb18ff678ffee27f43faa3c8b0e1560.png[/img]
To celebrate the closing of the Cologne Major, new items are available in the Major Shop: the IEM Cologne 2026 Champions Autograph stickers (featuring Paper, Holo, Foil, and Gold autographs from Falcons players), and IEM Cologne 2026 Highlight Charms (featuring 10 highlights for each of the six stages of the Cologne 2026 Major, and the Falcons' trophy-lifting moment.)

Congratulations to the Falcons, champions of the Cathedral and champions of the IEM Cologne 2026 Major![/p]
newsitems.contents_en:
[p][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/97e2906ad1381f57c881ca5049649e1d38001ac3.jpg[/img]Taking on the toughest Playoff bracket in Major history, the Falcons made a triumphant statement at the IEM Cologne 2026 Major.

Facing the defending Major Champions in the Quarterfinals, Falcons defeated Vitality 2-1, with each map taking 24 rounds to determine a winner. The Semifinals weren't any easier, where the Falcons met Team Spirit in a best of three that saw two maps go to Overtime. In the end, the Falcons outlasted Team Spirit 16:12 on Dust II, taking the series 2-1 and booking their first appearance in the Grand Finals. 

In the Grand Finals the Falcons left no doubt, defeating FURIA 3-0 to claim the organization's first Major Championship.

[img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/1a646666feb18ff678ffee27f43faa3c8b0e1560.png[/img]
To celebrate the closing of the Cologne Major, new items are available in the Major Shop: the IEM Cologne 2026 Champions Autograph stickers (featuring Paper, Holo, Foil, and Gold autographs from Falcons players), and IEM Cologne 2026 Highlight Charms (featuring 10 highlights for each of the six stages of the Cologne 2026 Major, and the Falcons' trophy-lifting moment.)

Congratulations to the Falcons, champions of the Cathedral and champions of the IEM Cologne 2026 Major![/p]
newsitems.contents_cn:
[p][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/97e2906ad1381f57c881ca5049649e1d38001ac3.jpg[/img]在Major历史上最艰难的季后赛中，猎鹰队在IEM科隆2026年Major上取得了胜利。

四分之一决赛面对卫冕大满贯冠军，猎鹰队以 2-1 击败 Vitality，每张地图需要 24 轮才能决出胜负。半决赛也没有那么容易，猎鹰队在三局两胜的比赛中遇到了团队精神队，两张地图进入了加时赛。最终，猎鹰队在《Dust II》中以 16 分 12 秒击败 Team Spirit，以 2-1 拿下系列赛，首次闯入总决赛。 

在总决赛中，猎鹰队毫无悬念地以 3-0 击败 FURIA，夺得该组织的首个大满贯冠军。

[img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/1a646666feb18ff678ffee27f43faa3c8b0e1560.png[/img]
为了庆祝科隆特锦赛的闭幕，Major 商店推出了新商品：IEM 科隆 2026 冠军亲笔签名贴纸（包含猎鹰队球员的纸质签名、全息签名、铝箔签名和金质签名）和 IEM 科隆 2026 亮点吊饰（包含 2026 年科隆特锦赛六个赛段的每个赛段的 10 个亮点，以及猎鹰队举起奖杯的时刻。）

恭喜猎鹰队，大教堂冠军和 IEM 科隆 2026 Major 冠军！[/p]

newsitems.title: The IEM Cologne 2026 Grand Finals
newsitems.author: COMPLEX
newsitems.contents:
[img]https://clan.akamai.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/9f1d1c4b0485c1e7b3b667d4a7c748bd55c5bb46.png[/img]
Following one of the most unforgettable days in Major playoff history, Saturday's Semifinals left two teams standing in pursuit of a Major Championship.

After losing the opening map of their Playoffs, FURIA have been unbeaten, rallying back against 9z Team to win 2-1 in the Quarterfinals and taking down Aurora Gaming 2-0 in the Semifinals to reach the Grand Finals for the first time in the organization's history. 

Team Falcons took down the world's #1 team, Team Vitality, 2-1 in the Quarterfinals. A day later, they punched their ticket to the Grand Finals by defeating Team Spirit 2-1 in dramatic fashion, needing Overtime in the third map. This is Team Falcons first Major Championship appearance.  

Coverage of the best of five Grand Finals between FURIA and Team Falcons begins with the opening ceremony at 16:45 CEST (10:45AM EDT). Don't miss a moment!

And with the Major coming to a close, team and player stickers are still available, with 50% of tournament item sales being shared with the tournament organizer, teams, and players.

Good luck to both teams!
newsitems.contents_en:
[img]https://clan.akamai.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/9f1d1c4b0485c1e7b3b667d4a7c748bd55c5bb46.png[/img]
Following one of the most unforgettable days in Major playoff history, Saturday's Semifinals left two teams standing in pursuit of a Major Championship.

After losing the opening map of their Playoffs, FURIA have been unbeaten, rallying back against 9z Team to win 2-1 in the Quarterfinals and taking down Aurora Gaming 2-0 in the Semifinals to reach the Grand Finals for the first time in the organization's history. 

Team Falcons took down the world's #1 team, Team Vitality, 2-1 in the Quarterfinals. A day later, they punched their ticket to the Grand Finals by defeating Team Spirit 2-1 in dramatic fashion, needing Overtime in the third map. This is Team Falcons first Major Championship appearance.  

Coverage of the best of five Grand Finals between FURIA and Team Falcons begins with the opening ceremony at 16:45 CEST (10:45AM EDT). Don't miss a moment!

And with the Major coming to a close, team and player stickers are still available, with 50% of tournament item sales being shared with the tournament organizer, teams, and players.

Good luck to both teams!
newsitems.contents_cn:
[img]https://clan.akamai.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/9f1d1c4b0485c1e7b3b667d4a7c748bd55c5bb46.png[/img]
在经历了大满贯季后赛历史上最难忘的日子之一之后，周六的半决赛让两支球队争夺大满贯冠军。

在季后赛首轮失利后，FURIA 一直保持不败，在四分之一决赛中以 2-1 逆转战胜 9z Team，并在半决赛中以 2-0 击败 Aurora Gaming，历史上首次进入总决赛。 

猎鹰队在四分之一决赛中以 2-1 击败了世界排名第一的球队活力队。一天后，他们在第三张地图上经过加时赛，以戏剧性的方式以 2-1 击败 Team Spirit，从而获得了总决赛的入场券。这是猎鹰队首次参加大满贯赛。  

对 FURIA 与猎鹰队之间的总决赛五局三胜的报道从欧洲中部夏令时间 16:45（美国东部时间上午 10:45）开幕式开始。不要错过任何一刻！

随着Major 即将结束，球队和球员贴纸仍然可用，比赛物品销售的 50% 与比赛组织者、球队和球员分享。

祝两队好运！

newsitems.title: Playoffs at the "Cathedral of Counter-Strike"
newsitems.author: COMPLEX
newsitems.contents:
Playoffs at the IEM Cologne 2026 Major begin tomorrow and the "Cathedral of Counter-Strike" awaits.

[img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/c9131e2a48d99e4396581c0faa68467307e993c3.png[/img]

For the second consecutive Major, FURIA and Team Spirit finished Stage III with perfect 3-0 records. Aurora, Falcons, and Vitality finished 3-1, and 9z Team, BetBoom, and G2 Esports advanced with 3-2 records.

The Lanxess Arena will host the Playoffs, beginning with Thursday's Quarterfinals matchups:
[list]
[*] 9z Team vs. FURIA
[*] Aurora vs. BetBoom
[/list]The second set of Quarterfinals takes place Friday, featuring:
[list]
[*] G2 Esports vs. Team Spirit
[*] Falcons vs. Vitality
[/list]
With Semifinals on Saturday and the Grand Finals on Sunday, we're in for a great weekend of Counter-Strike.

As the Playoffs approach, there's still time to support your favorite teams. Team and player stickers are still available, with 50% of tournament item sales being shared with the tournament organizer, teams, and players.

And don't forget, all Playoff picks for the Pick'Em Challenge must be submitted prior to the first Playoff match beginning; you don't want to miss your Diamond Coin!

Vitality are looking to win their third straight Major. Will anyone stop them? Tune in and find out!

Vitality are looking to win their third straight Major. Will anyone stop them? Tune in and find out!
newsitems.title_cn: 季后赛在“反恐精英大教堂”举行
newsitems.contents_cn:
IEM 科隆 2026 Major 季后赛将于明天开始，“反恐精英大教堂”正等待着您。

[img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/c9131e2a48d99e4396581c0faa68467307e993c3.png[/img]

FURIA 和 Team Spirit 连续第二年以 3-0 的完美战绩结束了第三阶段的Major。 Aurora、Falcons 和 Vitality 以 3-1 获胜，9z Team、BetBoom 和 G2 Esports 以 3-2 战绩晋级。

朗盛竞技场将举办季后赛，从周四的四分之一决赛对决开始：
[列表]
[*] 9z Team 对阵 FURIA
[*] Aurora 与 BetBoom
[/list]第二组四分之一决赛将于周五举行，其中包括：
[列表]
[*] G2 Esports 与 Team Spirit
[*] 猎鹰队 vs. 活力队
[/列表]
随着周六的半决赛和周日的总决赛，我们将迎来一个精彩的《反恐精英》周末。

随着季后赛的临近，您仍然有时间支持您最喜欢的球队。球队和球员贴纸仍然可用，比赛物品销售的 50% 与比赛组织者、球队和球员分享。

并且不要忘记，Pick'Em 挑战赛的所有季后赛选秀权都必须在第一场季后赛比赛开始之前提交；你不想错过你的钻石币！

活力队希望连续第三次赢得大满贯冠军。有人会阻止他们吗？收听并找出答案！

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: Vitaliy
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ COLOGNE 2026 ][/p][list][*][p]Added display of lowest and highest sticker price in the last 7 days in the Cologne 2026 Major Shop.[/p][/*][*][p]Added stickers showcase to the Cologne 2026 Major Hub tile on the main menu.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Added multi-select functionality in Storage Units deposit/retrieve UI.[/p][/*][*][p]Added appropriate error message when user's inventory is full and they try to redeem Weekly Care Package rewards, Armory items, or items in the Major Shop cart.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed number wrapping rules in some languages.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ COLOGNE 2026 ][/p][list][*][p]Added display of lowest and highest sticker price in the last 7 days in the Cologne 2026 Major Shop.[/p][/*][*][p]Added stickers showcase to the Cologne 2026 Major Hub tile on the main menu.[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Added multi-select functionality in Storage Units deposit/retrieve UI.[/p][/*][*][p]Added appropriate error message when user's inventory is full and they try to redeem Weekly Care Package rewards, Armory items, or items in the Major Shop cart.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed number wrapping rules in some languages.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ 科隆 2026 ][/p][list][*][p]在科隆 2026 主要商店中添加了过去 7 天内最低和最高标价的显示。[/p][/*][*][p]在主菜单上的科隆 2026 主要枢纽图块中添加了贴纸展示。[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]在存储单元存款/检索用户界面中添加了多选功能。[/p][/*][*][p]当用户的库存已满并尝试兑换每周护理包奖励、军械库物品或主要商店购物车中的物品时添加了适当的错误消息。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了某些语言的数字换行规则。[/p][/*][/list]
